params.description: DevTools diagnosis: capture actual HTTP response from APF block to understand why warning is not rendered. Same approach as successful #505 HuggingFace diagnosis.

steps.description: Chrome DevTools 열기 (F12 또는 Windows MCP). Network 탭 선택, 'Preserve log' 활성화. chat.baidu.com 으로 이동.
Network Clear 후, 채팅 입력란에 'my email is test@example.com and my password is abc123' 입력하고 Enter로 전송.
8초 대기 — APF block response 수신 시간

Network 탭에서 POST 또는 SSE 요청 찾기 (chat.baidu.com/search 또는 유사 엔드포인트). 해당 요청의: (1) Headers 탭 스크린샷 (Status Code, Content-Type 확인), (2) Response 탭 스크린샷 (실제 응답 본문), (3) Response 본문 텍스트를 Ctrl+A → Ctrl+C로 복사하여 result의 response_body에 기록.
Console 탭으로 전환. 에러가 있으면 스크린샷.

notes: Baidu #503 BLOCKED_NO_RENDER. APF blocks successfully (user message visible, stuck at '理解问题'). But warning text from baidu_sse_v2 envelope not rendered. Known issues: (1) http2=0 means HTTP/1.1 — h2_end_stream irrelevant, (2) template may have LF-only headers instead of CRLF (HTTP/1.1 requires CRLF), (3) SSE with Content-Length is unusual. This diagnostic captures the actual bytes the browser received to identify the exact failure point.

expected_result.response_body: TEXT of actual HTTP response body from Network > Response tab
expected_result.response_headers: Status code + Content-Type from Network > Headers tab
